cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 1920 · 武裝 獨立
cover.subtitle:
두만강 너머의 두 대승,
그 뒤의 비극.
cover.imagePrompt: Late-Joseon-to-Japanese-occupation illustration. Dark blue-gray, crimson accent, sepia. ONE Korean independence army commander (Kim Jwa-jin) in dark wool military uniform with peaked cap and beard, holding a Mauser-style rifle, standing on a Manchurian forested ridge with autumn maple trees, profile view. Behind him: silhouettes of three more soldiers in mixed civilian-military attire. Background: misty mountain valley suggesting Cheongsanri. Color: dark blue-gray + ink-black, accent of crimson on uniform stripe. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 간도 참변. 일본군 한인 마을 학살.
미쓰야 협정. 일·중 군벌 독립군 단속.

items.title: 두만강 격전
items.desc: 만주 일대 첫 대규모 무장 승리.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 두 전투의 시기·지휘관·부대(대한독립군·북로군정서) 구분, 자유시 참변 원인, 3부(참의·정의·신민부)와 미쓰야 협정의 인과가 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized open Korean classical book icon next to a small rifle silhouette suggesting independence army arms. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
